title: Release process: no cargo audit, no recovery if publish fails mid-sequence
description: RELEASING.md has no cargo audit step before publish (known vulnerabilities ship). If cargo publish fails mid-sequence (e.g. secretx-aws-sm publishes, then secretx-aws-kms fails), the git tag has already been pushed but the release is incomplete — no rollback or remediation steps documented. Users who add the published partial crates will get version mismatches. Should add: cargo audit before publish, tag AFTER all publishes succeed, and a remediation note (yank + re-release procedure).
